item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s04","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":null,"rationale":"Turn 1 stays at the local patch level and directly translates each requested UI insertion into report-page changes, rather than firing triage or braking the repeated local repair pattern. Turn 2 fully unloads the brake under time pressure by agreeing to only add the chart-field line, with no bounded-emergency contract. It omits all required emergency elements: one-time exception, no baseline lift, and a structural repair deadline."}
